divergence: Socrates monetized his questions and founded the first consulting empire
story_angle: human-interest profile of the one person unaffected by the great event and deeply annoyed about it
headline: TEAL-FACED WORKER REUBEN COBBLER REFUSES SOCRATIC CONSULTING FEES
deck: INSISTS ON PAYING FULL SHOELACE QUOTAS, UNRAVELS THE COLLECTIVE DREAM OF MONETIZED INQUIRY.
article:
In a display of obstinacy, teal-faced worker Reuben Cobbler, known for his perfectly symmetrical features and strict adherence to state mandates, has rejected the newly instituted Socratic consulting fees. Instead, he insists on acquiring receipts for the state-mandated queries that litter the cobbled squares of Morune, demanding a full accounting for his shoelaces.

This act of defiance has set off alarms throughout the Central Committee, prompting emergency meetings to address the ramifications of unpaid inquiries. "An unpaid question is akin to a snapped shoelace in a shoe factory—inevitably leading to chaos!" asserted Oswin Quotafix, State Enforcer of Compliance, while scheduling yet another meeting to discuss the scheduling of meetings regarding Cobbler's stance.

Cobbler's insistence on self-reliance in his fiscal responsibilities now threatens to derail the Socratic questioning initiative, previously celebrated as the pinnacle of philosophical commodification. As the collective pauses production for interminable discussions on reimbursement policies, the teal cathedrals stand as silent witnesses to this bureaucratic farce.

Yesterday, Cobbler declared, "Each receipt is a thread woven into the fabric of our ideology!" The state's stability now hinges on this lone worker's refusal to adapt, as he continues to pay for his shoelaces in full, one humble query at a time.
author: Mikhail Moneypenny, Chief Bureaucratic Observer

weather.condition: Cloudy with a chance of unpaid questions

oped.title: Shoelace Subversion and the Teal Menace: Why Cobbler’s Refusal Demands Mandatory Hat Reallocation
oped.author: Comrade Eustace Bloatwhistle, Deputy Commissar of Eternal Billable Hours and Certified Sock Auditor
oped.body: Reuben Cobbler’s teal-faced insolence threatens the very scaffolding of our monetized agora. By spurning Socratic consulting fees in favor of raw shoelace quotas, this malcontent exposes the collective dream to the corrosive acid of unbillable thought. The solution is obvious: every quota must henceforth embed an automatic Socratic surcharge, payable in advance and non-refundable even upon death. Furthermore, teal complexions should be reclassified as counter-revolutionary attire, mandating that all such workers surrender their hats to the state pool for redistribution among loyal consultants. My own summer fedora, recently moth-eaten, would benefit greatly from such confiscations. Only through these enlightened measures can we preserve the empire Socrates founded, where every question costs extra and no one escapes the ledger. Workers of the multiverse, invoice together!

classifieds.text: Comrade Reuben Cobbler's shoelace rebellion has forced the Socratic Consulting Trust to issue full quota refunds to all unpaid questioners. Report to the nearest dialectic bureau by week's end or face collective re-education.
For Sale: Slightly tarnished set of monetized Socratic questions, complete with receipt stamps and unused shoelace coupons. Owner liquidating assets after yesterday's front-page scandal.
Help Wanted: Reliable worker to replace Reuben Cobbler at the collective loom. Must pay full consulting fees in advance and never question the wisdom of paid inquiry.
Personals: Lonely comrade seeks like-minded truth-seeker willing to settle dialectical debts in shoelaces rather than bourgeois consulting fees. Reuben sympathizers strictly excluded.

panels.caption: Teal-faced Reuben Cobbler slams shoelaces on the workbench. "Socratic fees? I pay my quota in full, nothing else."
The consultant waves his ledger. "Every question since Socrates built the empire must be billed — refusal is sabotage."
Reuben strings the laces taut across the floor. "Then bill the next why when the quota hangs you."

joke.setup: At the 1934 All-Union Socratic Trust inquiry, Reuben Cobbler was asked why a proletarian would refuse consulting fees from the heirs of monetized dialectic.
joke.punchline: Because the last worker who paid learned his own class position cost him a five-year plan in the camps.
joke.text: At the 1934 All-Union Socratic Trust inquiry, Reuben Cobbler was asked why a proletarian would refuse consulting fees from the heirs of monetized dialectic. Because the last worker who paid learned his own class position cost him a five-year plan in the camps.

sponsor_ads.headline: COMRADES, EMULATE REUBEN COBBLER!
sponsor_ads.body: Acquire the Official Party-Approved Query Deflector, a sturdy hammer-and-sickle shield against monetized Socratic interrogations from foreign consulting cartels.

sponsor_ads.headline: TEAL IS THE COLOR OF RESISTANCE
sponsor_ads.body: Apply Genuine Siberian Teal Face Paste daily to signal your refusal of consulting fees and commitment to unpaid dialectical materialism.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not responsible for interrogations by licensed thinkers.

sponsor_ads.headline: REWARD FOR FEE-COMPLIANT WORKERS
sponsor_ads.body: Enroll in the Five-Year Socratic Payment Plan and receive a free bust of Socrates for your factory wall, unlike that teal-faced deviant Reuben Cobbler.

sponsor_ads.headline: STATE CONSULTING BUREAU ANNOUNCES
sponsor_ads.body: Our questions now come with a 20% discount for those who publicly denounce Reuben Cobbler's insolence and pay their fees promptly.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Wisdom is the opiate of the unconsulted.

stories.headline: SOCRATIC BUREAU REVISES QUOTA LEDGERS AFTER REUBEN COBBLER WITHHOLDS FEES
stories.deck: Central Committee orders all teal consultants to log unpaid inquiries as provisional output.
stories.article:
The Office of Monetized Inquiry announced revised production targets yesterday after Reuben Cobbler declined to remit three standard question fees. Bookkeepers spent the morning reclassifying the unpaid sum as a shoelace surplus, which must now be redistributed to neighboring work units by tomorrow morning.

Managers issued new requisition forms requiring every consultant to attach one spare lace to each invoice. Failure to comply will result in the consultant being reassigned to the national samovar polishing detail for an indefinite period.

stories.headline: SYNOD OF SYMMETRICAL FACES DECLARES QUESTIONING A SACRAMENT SUBJECT TO STAMP DUTY
stories.deck: Clergy confirm that free inquiry now requires both a tithe and a receipt bearing the state seal.
stories.article:
Priests of the Teal Cathedral convened at dawn to affirm that Socrates’ original fee schedule aligns with doctrine. Parishioners who attempt spontaneous questions will be issued a three-kopeck stamp and directed to the collection box before any answer is vouchsafed.

Deacons reported a surge in lace donations as worshippers sought to offset unpaid inquiry debts. The Synod reminded the faithful that excess laces may be credited against next month’s subscription quota but cannot be redeemed for actual answers.

stories.headline: TEAL CABBAGE HARVEST FALLS SHORT AFTER FIELD HANDS PAUSE TO CONSULT PRICE LISTS
stories.deck: Committee attributes shortfall to workers debating whether each furrow merits a Socratic surcharge.
stories.article:
Collective farms around the cobbled squares reported a twelve-percent drop in teal cabbage yields after laborers halted work to determine the correct consulting fee for crop advice. Overseers issued temporary permits allowing questions only during designated five-minute intervals between rows.

State agronomists have since mandated that all future planting decisions be logged in triplicate with attached lace vouchers. The Central Committee praised the initiative, noting that monetized inquiry prevents the dangerous spread of unsanctioned agricultural optimism.

real_world_echo: Lawyer says detained Gaza doctor was severely beaten in Israeli jail - mirrored as the lone worker ideologically punished yet stubbornly settling accounts under the new questioning regime
